modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to roll over MBM to the new fiscal year.

full_description_text:  
So, I'm trying to get MBM rolled over to the new fiscal year, but I'm not sure how to do it. I just need it done so we can keep everything on track. It's kinda important for the budgeting stuff, you know? Just looking for some help to make it happen.
short_description: Need to roll over MBM to the new fiscal year.
description: So, I'm trying to get MBM rolled over to the new fiscal year, but I'm not sure how to do it. I just need it done so we can keep everything on track. It's kinda important for the budgeting stuff, you know? Just looking for some help to make it happen.
